classification.reasoning: The patch introduces a new class DelayableWriteChannel with complex synchronization and delayed write logic, modifies multiple existing classes to integrate this new channel type, and changes the message dispatching and execution flow in PostgresWireProtocol to handle delayed writes. The patch also includes changes to ResultSetReceiver and RowCountReceiver to work with delayed writes, and modifies Netty transport classes. The changes involve deep structural refactoring to handle message ordering and concurrency issues, indicating significant API divergence and complexity beyond simple string replacements or minor formatting changes. The localization evidence shows the patch applies exactly or with high confidence, but the complexity of the changes and the introduction of new concurrency control mechanisms justify a TYPE_IV classification.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new class DelayableWriteChannel that wraps a Netty Channel to allow delaying writes until explicitly flushed or discarded.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable buffering and delaying of outbound write operations on a Netty channel, ensuring controlled write ordering and batching.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To include Sessions class for later usage in the file.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed unused import of io.crate.session.Sessions.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Cleanup unused import to reduce clutter.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed setting of child channel option AUTO_READ to false on bootstrap.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To change channel auto-read behavior, likely to enable immediate reading on child channels.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Simplified pipeline setup by directly adding a new Netty4MessageChannelHandler instance instead of assigning it to a variable first and removed explicit AUTO_READ option setting on channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Streamline channel pipeline setup and rely on default or external configuration for AUTO_READ.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayedWrites type in this class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable delaying writes on the channel by using the new DelayableWriteChannel wrapper.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified ReadyForQueryCallback constructor to remove Runnable parameter and only keep Channel and TransactionState fields.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify callback by removing the read Runnable, likely because reading is handled differently now.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed invocation of read.run() in ReadyForQueryCallback.accept method.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To stop triggering a read operation after sending ReadyForQuery, possibly to avoid premature reads or because reading is managed elsewhere.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channelRegistered handler to wrap the Netty Channel in a DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayableWriteChannel for all channel operations to support delayed writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified channelRead0 method to call dispatchState without ChannelHandlerContext parameter and use DelayableWriteChannel instead of Channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To adapt dispatching logic to work with DelayableWriteChannel and simplify method signature.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed dispatchState method to remove ChannelHandlerContext parameter and use DelayableWriteChannel instead of Channel; removed calls to ctx.read().
hunk_descriptions.intent: To decouple dispatchState from Netty context and adapt to DelayableWriteChannel usage.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified dispatchMessage method to remove ChannelHandlerContext parameter and use DelayableWriteChannel; removed calls to ctx.read().
hunk_descriptions.intent: To adapt message dispatching to work with DelayableWriteChannel and remove dependency on Netty context for reading.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed call to ctx.read() after sending error response for unsupported message types.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To change flow control after error response, possibly because reading is managed differently now.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced lambda parameter name from underscore (_) to f in chained listeners after sending AuthenticationOK.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Cosmetic change to improve readability or consistency in lambda parameter naming.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleExecute method signature to accept ByteBuf and DelayableWriteChannel instead of ChannelHandlerContext and Channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To adapt execute handling to use DelayableWriteChannel and simplify parameters.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced delaying of writes by creating a DelayedWrites instance from the channel before executing the query; added detailed comment explaining the need to delay writes to preserve message order.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure correct ordering of messages sent asynchronously by buffering writes until execution completes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified RowCountReceiver construction to pass DelayedWrites instance.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable RowCountReceiver to participate in delayed write buffering.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified ResultSetReceiver construction to pass DelayedWrites instance; removed handling of pendingExecution future and ctx.read calls.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To integrate delayed writes into ResultSetReceiver and simplify asynchronous execution flow.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In handleSync method, replaced ctx.read calls with channel.writePendingMessages() to flush delayed writes; updated ReadyForQueryCallback usage and added discardDelayedWrites call on error.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure all delayed writes are flushed on sync and to properly discard delayed writes on error.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed handleSimpleQuery method signature to accept ByteBuf and DelayableWriteChannel instead of Runnable and Channel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To adapt simple query handling to use DelayableWriteChannel and remove explicit read callback.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed call to read.run() after sending error response in handleSimpleQuery catch block.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To change flow control after error response, likely because reading is managed differently now.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified composedFuture.whenComplete call to use new ReadyForQueryCallback constructor without Runnable; changed handleSingleQuery signature to accept DelayableWriteChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To adapt asynchronous query handling to use DelayableWriteChannel and updated callback.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In handleDescribeMessage, added creation of DelayedWrites from channel and passed it to RowCountReceiver.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable delayed write buffering during describe message handling for DML queries.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In handleSingleQuery, added call to channel.discardDelayedWrites() before sending error response on exception.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To clean up any buffered delayed writes when an error occurs during query handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of DelayableWriteChannel.DelayedWrites.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use DelayedWrites type in ResultSetReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel; added fields for DelayedWrites and directChannel (bypassing delay).

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified constructor to accept DelayedWrites and initialize directChannel by bypassing delay.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To integrate delayed write buffering into ResultSetReceiver and allow direct writes bypassing delay.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed setNextRow method to send data rows via directChannel instead of delayed channel; checked writability on directChannel.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To send row data immediately on the underlying channel while buffering other writes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified batchFinished, allFinished, and fail methods to flush directChannel and write out pending delayed writes before flushing; replaced listener parameter names with f.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure all delayed writes are flushed before signaling completion or failure and improve lambda parameter naming consistency.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed channel field type from Channel to DelayableWriteChannel; added DelayedWrites field; updated constructor accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support delayed write buffering in RowCountReceiver.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified allFinished and fail methods to send responses via channel.bypassDelay(), flush channel after writing pending delayed writes, and updated listener parameter names.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To ensure delayed writes are flushed before signaling completion or failure and send responses directly on underlying channel.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline.addLast call.
hunk_descriptions.intent: Simplify pipeline setup by removing unnecessary local variable.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Replaced local variable assignment of Netty4MessageChannelHandler with direct instantiation in pipeline.addLast call.
